fields.label: Reward & Incentive Method
fields.description: How to allocate Reward and Incentive amounts when a Sales Invoice is submitted. Quotation Wise = proportional to invoice value vs quote total. Item Wise = per Quotation Item using qty proportion.

fields.label: Company Account Mapping
fields.description: Liability and expense accounts per company used when posting the Reward / Incentive Journal Entry on Sales Invoice submit.

fields.label: Quotation High-Probability Workflow
fields.description: Roles that drive the High-Probability Quotation lock, the Document Approval flow (Request for Update / Cancellation Check), and the Restricted-Roles RBAC.

fields.label: Quote Approval Role
fields.description: Single role that approves Document Approval transitions on submitted high-probability quotes (Request for Update, Cancellation Check, Send for Approval). Mirrors the Sales Order 'Supply Chain Head' pattern. Cannot self-approve.

fields.label: Quotation Team Role
fields.description: Role that owns Quotations and submits Document Approval requests. Members are also auto-whitelisted for the High-Probability lock.

fields.label: Restricted Roles (Read-only on Approved+100)
fields.description: Roles whose users see only Quotations where workflow_state='Approved' AND probability=100. Typically downstream teams: Dispatch, Procurement, Supply Chain, Logistics.

fields.label: Signature Images for Print Formats
fields.description: Upload signature PNGs that render dynamically on Payment Voucher print formats. The 'Signature Slot' on each row is what the print template looks up — use a workflow role label ('Approved Level 1', 'Approved Level 2', 'Authorised', 'Released') for dynamic signers, or a free-form name ('Siby Joy', 'Siby Thomas John') for static signers.
